org.siprop.v2.b2bua
Interface B2BUAContext

All Superinterfaces:
Context, java.io.Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
B2BUAContextImpl, DefaultSIPB2BUAContext
public interface B2BUAContext
extends Context

This interface the dialog about a B2BUA.

Author:
noritsuna
